_metadata.description: Mission input file for the HELIOX X1 drone sizing tool.
_metadata.author: ADI — Aéro Drone Innovation

mission.name: HELIOX_X1_5030
mission.description: X8 coaxial octorotor for infrastructure inspection. Baseline sizing configuration with 6S LiPo and target TWR of 2.0.

_comments.m_struct_kg: Structural mass: airframe + motors + ESCs + electronics + wiring. Excludes battery and payload.
_comments.m_payload_kg: Payload mass: inspection sensors, gimbal, cameras. Excludes battery.
_comments.configuration: Rotor layout. Supported values: 'quad' (4 motors, flat), 'hexa' (6 motors, flat), 'octo' (8 motors, flat), 'x8' (8 motors coaxial, 4 pairs).
_comments.TWR_cible: Target thrust-to-weight ratio at MTOW. Used to validate motor selection.
_comments.vitesse_kmh: Nominal cruise speed in km/h. Used to compute optimal propeller pitch for forward flight.
_comments.batterie_S: Battery cell count (number of cells in series). Effective voltage = S x 3.7V.
_comments.helice_diametre_inch: Propeller diameter in inches (mandatory, from manufacturer datasheet).
_comments.helice_pas_inch: Propeller pitch in inches (mandatory, from manufacturer datasheet).
